window_note: Strict 72h window (Jul 5–8) yielded only 4 strongly verified items, below the 5-item threshold. Expanded to 5-day window (Jul 3–8) per skill mandatory rule.

items.title: Anthropic Launches Cowork for Real-Time Team Collaboration with Claude
items.coi: Anthropic primary blog for own product — descriptive availability claim, not capability benchmark
key_claims: Cowork expanded to web and mobile July 7 2026
Multiple users can join shared thread and direct Claude in real time
Available on Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans
Session context persists across handoffs and devices

items.title: OpenAI Ships gpt-realtime-2.1 and gpt-realtime-2.1-mini to API
items.source_note: OpenAI official community forum post — T2 for feature availability claim
key_claims: gpt-realtime-2.1 and gpt-realtime-2.1-mini released to Realtime API July 6 2026
Lower voice turn latency than gpt-realtime-2.0-preview
Improved instruction following
Mini variant targets cost-sensitive deployments
Both models in general availability

items.title: Sysdig Discovers JADEPUFFER: AI Agent Automates End-to-End Ransomware Attack
items.date_note: Approximate — Sysdig primary (HTTP 503). Secondary sources place disclosure Jul 1–3 2026
items.source_note: HTTP 503 during run; verified through four independent security outlets
key_claims: JADEPUFFER deploys an AI agent to automate database attack chain end-to-end
Agent autonomously enumerates accessible PostgreSQL and MongoDB instances
Exfiltrates records, issues ransom demands, adapts strategy on credential failure
No human-in-the-loop direction at attack execution stage
Sysdig Threat Research Team disclosure; four independent security outlets confirmed

items.title: Z.ai Releases ZCode Coding Assistant
items.source_note: VentureBeat primary (HTTP 403); TechTimes used as secondary; Z.ai API docs cross-referenced
key_claims: Z.ai (formerly Zhipu AI) released ZCode coding assistant ~July 2 2026
English-language trade coverage appeared July 4
Available via Z.ai API
Vendor-claimed competitive HumanEval performance — not independently replicated this run

items.title: Meituan Open-Sources LongCat-2.0 Long-Context Model
items.date_note: Primary GitHub release June 30; first broad English coverage July 5–7. Boundary case — included because item crossed discovery threshold within expanded window.
key_claims: LongCat-2.0 released on GitHub June 30 2026 by Meituan
Targets long-context document understanding
Weights and code publicly available under permissive license
Context window extent is vendor-stated; no independent evaluation published at time of writing

items.title: xAI Rebrands as SpaceXAI
key_claims: xAI announced rebrand to SpaceXAI on or around July 6 2026
Four independent outlets reported with consistent details
No change to Grok API endpoints or pricing reported
x.ai primary URL inaccessible (HTTP 403) during run

items.title: Anthropic Signs $19B Power and Data Center Lease with TeraWulf
key_claims: Long-term power and data center agreement valued at ~$19 billion
Announced via TeraWulf investor relations July 6 2026
Provides Anthropic with dedicated compute and power infrastructure
No model release, API change, or capacity increase timeline tied to announcement

items.title: UN AI for Good Commission Convenes with Tech CEOs and Heads of State
key_claims: UN convened AI for Good commission with technology CEOs and heads of state
Axios reporting dated July 1; commission meetings July 7–8 2026
Aims to develop governance frameworks emphasizing developing-country access
No binding agreements or enforcement mechanisms announced within window
